title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal claims high-adoption teams using AI tools completed a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6 times faster than baseline. Cursor reports that PayPal could deliver 40% more capabilities in 2026 through expanded AI-driven development practices.
